verses.latin_vulgate: Verbum Domini, quod factum est ad Michæam Morasthiten, in diebus Joathan, Achaz, et Ezechiæ, regum Juda, quod vidit super Samariam et Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֣ה ׀ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָיָ֗ה אֶל־מִיכָה֙ הַמֹּ֣רַשְׁתִּ֔י בִּימֵ֥י יוֹתָ֛ם אָחָ֥ז יְחִזְקִיָּ֖ה מַלְכֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה אֲשֶׁר־חָזָ֥ה עַל־שֹׁמְר֖וֹן וִירֽוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: The word of the Lord that came to Micah the Morasthite in the days of Jotham, Ahaz, and Hezekiah, kings of Judah, which he saw concerning Samaria and Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audite, populi omnes,  et attendat terra, et plenitudo ejus :  et sit Dominus Deus vobis in testem,  Dominus de templo sancto suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעוּ֙ עַמִּ֣ים כֻּלָּ֔ם הַקְשִׁ֖יבִי אֶ֣רֶץ וּמְלֹאָ֑הּ וִיהִי֩ אֲדֹנָ֨י יֱהֹוִ֤ה בָּכֶם֙ לְעֵ֔ד אֲדֹנָ֖י מֵהֵיכַ֥ל קׇדְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Hear, all ye people; hearken, O earth, and all that therein is: and let the Lord God be witness against you, the Lord from his holy temple.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia ecce Dominus egredietur de loco suo,  et descendet, et calcabit super excelsa terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה יֹצֵ֣א מִמְּקוֹמ֑וֹ וְיָרַ֥ד וְדָרַ֖ךְ עַל־[בָּ֥מֳתֵי] (במותי) אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: For, behold, the Lord cometh forth out of his place, and will come down, and tread upon the high places of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et consumentur montes subtus eum,  et valles scindentur sicut cera a facie ignis,  et sicut aquæ quæ decurrunt in præceps.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָמַ֤סּוּ הֶֽהָרִים֙ תַּחְתָּ֔יו וְהָעֲמָקִ֖ים יִתְבַּקָּ֑עוּ כַּדּוֹנַג֙ מִפְּנֵ֣י הָאֵ֔שׁ כְּמַ֖יִם מֻגָּרִ֥ים בְּמוֹרָֽד׃
verses.king_james: And the mountains shall be molten under him, and the valleys shall be cleft, as wax before the fire, and as the waters that are poured down a steep place.

verses.latin_vulgate: In scelere Jacob omne istud,  et in peccatis domus Israël.  Quod scelus Jacob ? nonne Samaria ?  et quæ excelsa Judæ ? nonne Jerusalem ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּפֶ֤שַׁע יַֽעֲקֹב֙ כׇּל־זֹ֔את וּבְחַטֹּ֖אות בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מִֽי־פֶ֣שַׁע יַעֲקֹ֗ב הֲלוֹא֙ שֹֽׁמְר֔וֹן וּמִי֙ בָּמ֣וֹת יְהוּדָ֔ה הֲל֖וֹא יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: For the transgression of Jacob is all this, and for the sins of the house of Israel. What is the transgression of Jacob? is it not Samaria? and what are the high places of Judah? are they not Jerusalem?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ponam Samariam quasi acervum lapidum in agro,  cum plantatur vinea ;  et detraham in vallem lapides ejus,  et fundamenta ejus revelabo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׂמְתִּ֥י שֹׁמְר֛וֹן לְעִ֥י הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה לְמַטָּ֣עֵי כָ֑רֶם וְהִגַּרְתִּ֤י לַגַּי֙ אֲבָנֶ֔יהָ וִיסֹדֶ֖יהָ אֲגַלֶּֽה׃
verses.king_james: Therefore I will make Samaria as an heap of the field, and as plantings of a vineyard: and I will pour down the stones thereof into the valley, and I will discover the foundations thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omnia sculptilia ejus concidentur,  et omnes mercedes ejus comburentur igne,  et omnia idola ejus ponam in perditionem,  quia de mercedibus meretricis congregata sunt,  et usque ad mercedem meretricis revertentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇל־פְּסִילֶ֣יהָ יֻכַּ֗תּוּ וְכׇל־אֶתְנַנֶּ֙יהָ֙ יִשָּׂרְפ֣וּ בָאֵ֔שׁ וְכׇל־עֲצַבֶּ֖יהָ אָשִׂ֣ים שְׁמָמָ֑ה כִּ֠י מֵאֶתְנַ֤ן זוֹנָה֙ קִבָּ֔צָה וְעַד־אֶתְנַ֥ן זוֹנָ֖ה יָשֽׁוּבוּ׃
verses.king_james: And all the graven images thereof shall be beaten to pieces, and all the hires thereof shall be burned with the fire, and all the idols thereof will I lay desolate: for she gathered it of the hire of an harlot, and they shall return to the hire of an harlot.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super hoc plangam, et ululabo ;  vadam spoliatus, et nudus ;  faciam planctum velut draconum,  et luctum quasi struthionum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־זֹאת֙ אֶסְפְּדָ֣ה וְאֵילִ֔ילָה אֵילְכָ֥ה (שילל) [שׁוֹלָ֖ל] וְעָר֑וֹם אֶעֱשֶׂ֤ה מִסְפֵּד֙ כַּתַּנִּ֔ים וְאֵ֖בֶל כִּבְנ֥וֹת יַעֲנָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Therefore I will wail and howl, I will go stripped and naked: I will make a wailing like the dragons, and mourning as the owls.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia desperata est plaga ejus,  quia venit usque ad Judam ;  tetigit portam populi mei usque ad Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י אֲנוּשָׁ֖ה מַכּוֹתֶ֑יהָ כִּי־בָ֙אָה֙ עַד־יְהוּדָ֔ה נָגַ֛ע עַד־שַׁ֥עַר עַמִּ֖י עַד־יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: For her wound is incurable; for it is come unto Judah; he is come unto the gate of my people, even to Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: In Geth nolite annuntiare ;  lacrimis ne ploretis ;  in domo pulveris pulvere vos conspergite.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּגַת֙ אַל־תַּגִּ֔ידוּ בָּכ֖וֹ אַל־תִּבְכּ֑וּ בְּבֵ֣ית לְעַפְרָ֔ה עָפָ֖ר (התפלשתי) [הִתְפַּלָּֽשִׁי]׃
verses.king_james: Declare ye it not at Gath, weep ye not at all: in the house of Aphrah roll thyself in the dust.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et transite vobis, habitatio pulchra, confusa ignominia :  non est egressa quæ habitat in exitu :  planctum domus vicina accipiet ex vobis, quæ stetit sibimet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִבְרִ֥י לָכֶ֛ם יוֹשֶׁ֥בֶת שָׁפִ֖יר עֶרְיָה־בֹ֑שֶׁת לֹ֤א יָֽצְאָה֙ יוֹשֶׁ֣בֶת צַֽאֲנָ֔ן מִסְפַּד֙ בֵּ֣ית הָאֵ֔צֶל יִקַּ֥ח מִכֶּ֖ם עֶמְדָּתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Pass ye away, thou inhabitant of Saphir, having thy shame naked: the inhabitant of Zaanan came not forth in the mourning of Beth–ezel; he shall receive of you his standing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia infirmata est in bonum,  quæ habitat in amaritudinibus ;  quia descendit malum a Domino in portam Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־חָ֥לָֽה לְט֖וֹב יוֹשֶׁ֣בֶת מָר֑וֹת כִּֽי־יָ֤רַד רָע֙ מֵאֵ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה לְשַׁ֖עַר יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: For the inhabitant of Maroth waited carefully for good: but evil came down from the Lord unto the gate of Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tumultus quadrigæ stuporis habitanti Lachis :  principium peccati est filiæ Sion,  quia in te inventa sunt scelera Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְתֹ֧ם הַמֶּרְכָּבָ֛ה לָרֶ֖כֶשׁ יוֹשֶׁ֣בֶת לָכִ֑ישׁ רֵאשִׁ֨ית חַטָּ֥את הִיא֙ לְבַת־צִיּ֔וֹן כִּי־בָ֥ךְ נִמְצְא֖וּ פִּשְׁעֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: O thou inhabitant of Lachish, bind the chariot to the swift beast: she is the beginning of the sin to the daughter of Zion: for the transgressions of Israel were found in thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea dabit emissarios super hæreditatem Geth,  domus mendacii in deceptionem regibus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵן֙ תִּתְּנִ֣י שִׁלּוּחִ֔ים עַ֖ל מוֹרֶ֣שֶׁת גַּ֑ת בָּתֵּ֤י אַכְזִיב֙ לְאַכְזָ֔ב לְמַלְכֵ֖י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: Therefore shalt thou give presents to Moresheth–gath: the houses of Achzib shall be a lie to the kings of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adhuc hæredem adducam tibi quæ habitas in Maresa ;  usque ad Odollam veniet gloria Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹ֗ד הַיֹּרֵשׁ֙ אָ֣בִי לָ֔ךְ יוֹשֶׁ֖בֶת מָֽרֵשָׁ֑ה עַד־עֲדֻלָּ֥ם יָב֖וֹא כְּב֥וֹד יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: Yet will I bring an heir unto thee, O inhabitant of Mareshah: he shall come unto Adullam the glory of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Decalvare, et tondere super filios deliciarum tuarum ;  dilata calvitium tuum sicut aquila,  quoniam captivi ducti sunt ex te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קׇרְחִ֣י וָגֹ֔זִּי עַל־בְּנֵ֖י תַּעֲנוּגָ֑יִךְ הַרְחִ֤בִי קׇרְחָתֵךְ֙ כַּנֶּ֔שֶׁר כִּ֥י גָל֖וּ מִמֵּֽךְ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Make thee bald, and poll thee for thy delicate children; enlarge thy baldness as the eagle; for they are gone into captivity from thee.
